Description: Draft feature for integrating a cloud model that can evaluate photo content and quality.

Stories.StoryDescription: Define the provider abstraction, request schema, and response schema for cloud vision analysis.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a provider interface that supports a chosen cloud model.

Stories.StoryDescription: Test the provider abstraction with mocks so no real AI service is used in automated tests.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests cover provider integration without calling real AI services.
